## 1. Meet ScreenAssist <a id="1-meet-screenassist"></a>

A pro film room every basketball player can run — tag your own plays, build a college-ready reel, share one link.

> The hero pitch — Get seen, on film you already have.

## 2. One CTA, no friction <a id="2-one-cta-no-friction"></a>

The whole site funnels here — every "Start now" button drops you into signup. Free during beta, no credit card.

1. Look at **the Start now link in the top nav**.
2. Notice **the signup CTA in the top nav**.

> Free during beta · no credit card

## 3. How it works <a id="3-how-it-works"></a>

Five steps from your film to your future — self-tag plays, get instant stats, surface patterns, auto-build a reel, share one link.

1. Look at **the How it works section heading**.

> The 5-step workflow

## 4. Works on the film you already have <a id="4-works-on-the-film-you-already-have"></a>

iPhone bleacher clips, AAU livestream rips, that folder of old MP4s — ScreenAssist runs on whatever you've got.

1. Notice **the works-on-the-film-you-have section heading**.

## 5. Built for the player, made for everyone in their corner <a id="5-built-for-the-player-made-for-everyone-in-their-corner"></a>

Players own the reel. Coaches and trainers get the toolkit they can't always build themselves.

1. Look at **the for-parents-and-coaches section heading**.

## 6. Start free <a id="6-start-free"></a>

Pricing, FAQ, and one button to start. The pro film room every player can run.

1. Look at **the Start free button in pricing**.
2. Notice **the Start free button in pricing**.

> Start free — for players
